summary.en: An AI agent that turns AWS Inspector findings into prioritized remediation plans—summarizing risk, owners, and fixes with one conversational request.
summary.ko: An AI agent that turns AWS Inspector findings into prioritized remediation plans—summarizing risk, owners, and fixes with one conversational request.
summary.ja: AWS Inspectorの検出結果を、優先度付きの是正計画へ変換するAIエージェント。リスク、担当者、修正内容を、1回の会話型リクエストで要約します。

title.en: AIP Use Case: AWS Inspector Insight AI Agent
title.ko: AIP Use Case: AWS Inspector Insight AI Agent
title.ja: AIP活用事例： AWSインサイトAIエージェント
